name: Factory New
description:
After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves.

Every @NumberOfUpgradesBeforeRoundCostIncrease@ upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

Next Upgrade: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_GravesTrait_RoundsUntilUpgrade@ Rounds.
